name: paput
description: PaPut — turn AI-assisted work into a verifiable knowledge and judgment portfolio. Bundles the PaPut remote MCP server connection and skills for capturing, reviewing, and publishing reusable knowledge.

project_alias.title: Project alias
project_alias.description: Optional PaPut project alias to pin the project context (3-40 lowercase alphanumeric characters). Leave empty to connect without a project.
